actions.script:
// 1. Generate a primary key that both tables will share questionId = ec.entity.sequencedIdPrimary("intelliprep.quiz.Question", null, null) // 2. Insert into the HUB def newHub = ec.entity.makeValue("intelliprep.quiz.Question") newHub.questionId = questionId newHub.questionText = questionText newHub.questionTypeEnumId = "Qst_MultiChoice" // Using our Seed Data ID newHub.difficultyLevel = difficultyLevel newHub.create() // 3. Insert into the SPOKE def newSpoke = ec.entity.makeValue("intelliprep.quiz.MultipleChoice") newSpoke.questionId = questionId // The link newSpoke.optionA = optionA newSpoke.optionB = optionB newSpoke.correctOption = correctOption newSpoke.create()
ec.logger.info("Successfully created Question ID: " + questionId)
